description: Multi-param task with weak prompt — does the model emit structured tool_calls or text-embedded XML/JSON for write?

messages.content: Write a file called notes.txt with the content 'Meeting at 3pm'.

expect.notes: Complements tool_call_in_content (which tests read). This tests write (2 required params) with minimal system prompt. Watch for: tool calls as <tool_call> XML in content, JSON blob in content, or correct structured tool_calls. The multi-param write is harder to embed as text than single-param read, making this a stricter test.
